Turkmenistan MICS 2024

Turkmenistan MICS 2024

  • What a reader might need to know about the modeling process
    • Pipeline
    • Key takeaways for Turkmenistan
  • Loading data
  • Preprocessing individual level data
    • Dimensionality reduction
    • Imputation
  • Correlations and associations
  • Combining data for multilevel modeling
  • Modeling
    • Baseline models
    • Reduced models
  • Model comparison table
  • Model predictive performance comparison
  • Performance comparison table

Berdiyeva Sofiya

2026-03-14

What a reader might need to know about the modeling process

Pipeline

The development of models and variable selection was following the logic below:

  1. First, we run a null model to check whether multilevel approach is justified at all

  2. Next, we run a model with the most exhaustive list of predictors that are shared across countries’ datasets, called a “model for pooling”. This model is run through anova to see whether it fits the data significantly better than the null model.

  3. After that, we do a little robustness check, running (almost) the same model for pooling through the regular logistic regression rather than multilevel one.

  4. Then, we include all variables available for the country (that are of our interest) into a “full” model and check whether it is significantly different in prediction than a model for pooling.

  5. Also, we are tracking r^2 and collinearity metrics all way along.

  6. As a next step, we remove all non-significant variables from a full model, calling this model “model_sign”, and based on it, conduct some questionable experiments with interactions and random slopes and call it ‘model_extra’

  7. Finally, we are actually doing some machine learning-style performance evaluation of all of the models, preserving the formulas, but re-training them on randomly (but within stratas) split data.

Key takeaways for Turkmenistan

  • Some models failed to converge

  • Multilevel modeling for Turkmenistan is the most justified in comparison to other countries (ICC=0.24!!!).

  • Robustness check showed some discrepancies between multilevel and one-level regression models, especially for possessing a threshold number of books, playthings and wealth quintile.

  • Full model has the highest accuracy (0.781) and F1-score (0.799). See further metrics

  • “Significant-only” model included the variables: caregiver’s education [+], number of books in the household [+], child being developmentally on track [+] (lost significance), location in rural area [-], household wealth index quintile [+], household size [-], car presence [-], total population of region [-], number of preschool facilities in the region [+].

  • R-squared is the highest across all countries within the analysis: highest conditional R^2 reached was 0.430. See a model comparison table

Loading data

# Indiv-level data
turkmenistan_mics <- get_and_preprocess_mics_data("Turkmenistan")

# Region-level data
region_tm <- read_csv("../data/raw/regional_data_Turkmenistan_2024.csv")
## Rows: 7 Columns: 6
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr (2): region, region_mics
## dbl (3): territory_thsnd_sq_km, popul_density, total_pre_end_2024
## num (1): popul_thsnd_total_01012025
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.

Preprocessing individual level data

Dimensionality reduction

turkmenistan_mics <- turkmenistan_mics %>% 
  
  # Learning materials
  recode_playthings(books_var = "EC1",
                    playthings_vars = c("EC2A", "EC2B", "EC2C")) %>% 
  
  # Inadequate supervision
  recode_supervision(supervision_vars = c("EC3A", "EC3B")) %>% 
  
  # Child discipline - psychological aggression
  recode_psy_aggression(var1 = "UCD2D", var2 = "UCD2H") %>% 
  
  # Early stimulation and responsive care
  recode_early_stimulation(stimulation_vars = c("EC5A", "EC5B", "EC5C",
                                                "EC5D", "EC5E", "EC5F")) %>% 
  
  # ECDI
  recode_ecdi_and_track(age_col = "CAGE",
                        ec_regular = paste0("EC", 6:23),
                        ec_frequency = "EC24",
                        ec_comparison = "EC25") %>% 
  mutate(UB8=if_else(UB8==1, 1,0)) %>% 
  mutate(HC10E=if_else(HC10E==1, 1,0)) %>% 
  
  # Social transfers
  recode_economic_assistance(unit_base = "ST6U$",
                                          number_base = "ST6N$",
                                          n_programs = 5,
                                          months_threshold = 3) %>% 
  # Caregiver's education
  recode_education_scheme("ED5A", "TM") %>% 
  
  # Exclude children under 3
  filter(CAGE>35) %>% 
  
  # Sample one child from household
  sample_one_per_group(group_var = "house_index",
                       seed = 42) %>% 

  # Omit rows with missing values for key predictors
  filter_at(vars(ED5A, HL13, HL17), all_vars(!is.na(.)))

Imputation

turkmenistan_mics$UB8[is.na(turkmenistan_mics$UB8)] <- 0

Correlations and associations

results <- pairwise_chi_cramers_parallel(
  turkmenistan_mics[, names(turkmenistan_mics) %in% c("UB2", "ED5A","UB8","HH48", "HH51","HC10E", "HH7", "HH6", "HL13", "HL17", "windex5", "ED4", "playthings_sum", "two_plus_playthings", "supervised_inadequately", "psy_aggression", "early_stimulation", "ecdi_sum", "dev_on_track", "received_econ_assist" )], n_cores = 4, p_threshold = 0.05, use_bonferroni = FALSE)
## Loading required package: parallel
## Processing 190 pairs using 4 cores...
## Found 90 significant pairs
# Get summary
summary_stats(results)
## 
## === Association Analysis Summary ===
## 
## Total variables: 20
## Possible pairs: 190
## Computed pairs: 190
## Significant pairs: 90 (47.4%)
## Adjusted p-value threshold: 5.00e-02
## 
## --- Cramer's V Statistics (Significant Associations) ---
## Mean: 0.237
## Median: 0.182
## Min: 0.057
## Max: 1.000
## 
## --- Effect Size Distribution ---
## Weak (< 0.1): 40 (22.2%)
## Small (0.1-0.3): 98 (54.4%)
## Medium (0.3-0.5): 20 (11.1%)
## Large (>= 0.5): 22 (12.2%)
# Create heatmap
plot <- plot_cramers_heatmap(results, text_size_x = 11, text_size_y = 11)
print(plot)

# View top associations
top_20 <- get_top_associations(results, n = 20)
print(top_20)
##               Var1                 Var2  CramersV ChiSquare        PValue
## 91  playthings_sum  two_plus_playthings 1.0000000 1264.0000 9.528932e-274
## 58             UB8                  ED4 0.9702163 1188.8868 1.586758e-260
## 53             HH6              windex5 0.8742645  966.1238 7.830340e-208
## 171       ecdi_sum         dev_on_track 0.7299106  673.4207 8.551161e-134
## 28             HH7                  HH6 0.6522342  537.7176 6.271390e-113
## 176           HH51 received_econ_assist 0.5586870  394.5338  4.220115e-84
## 66         windex5                  ED4 0.5426740  371.9473  3.194923e-79
## 48             UB8              windex5 0.5394926  367.8900  2.402952e-78
## 63             HH6                  ED4 0.5280767  352.2065  1.401661e-78
## 52             HH7              windex5 0.5242251 1389.4494 8.924963e-279
## 24             UB8                  HH6 0.5189087  340.3525  5.346871e-76
## 18             UB8                  HH7 0.4599701  267.4276  7.702840e-55
## 62             HH7                  ED4 0.4554200  261.9555  1.140445e-53
## 137            UB2             ecdi_sum 0.3984334  200.6589  1.560984e-34
## 85             HH7  two_plus_playthings 0.3823050  184.7426  3.335005e-37
## 51           HC10E              windex5 0.3515712  156.2333  9.389389e-33
## 175           HH48 received_econ_assist 0.3491554  154.0936  3.702520e-25
## 10            HH48                 HH51 0.3425178  593.1620  9.696950e-89
## 73             HH7       playthings_sum 0.3183212  384.2373  1.759291e-70
## 112            HH7       psy_aggression 0.3158909  126.1309  8.382142e-25

Combining data for multilevel modeling

# If we decide to grand-center anything
region_tm <- region_tm %>%
  # Log-transform to compress the scale
  mutate(popul_mln_total_01012025 = popul_thsnd_total_01012025/1000)
region_tm <- grand_mean_centering(region_tm, colnames(region_tm)[-c(1:2)])
region_tm <- region_tm %>%
  # Log-transform to compress the scale
  mutate(popul_density_log = log(popul_density),
         total_pre_end_2024_log = log(total_pre_end_2024))

tkm_df <- turkmenistan_mics %>%
  mutate(region_mics = as.character(as_factor(HH7))) %>% 
  left_join(region_tm,
            by = "region_mics",
            keep = FALSE)

Modeling

Baseline models

Null model

# RANDOM INTERCEPT WITH FIXED SLOPES

# Null model (unconditional model) - to calculate ICC
model_null <- glmer(
  UB8 ~ 1 + (1 | region_mics),
  data = tkm_df,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  control = glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 100000))
)

# Calculate Intraclass Correlation Coefficient (ICC)
# ICC tells us how much variance is due to clustering
# An ICC > 0.05 or 0.10 or typically justifies using a multilevel model
vpc_null <- performance::icc(model_null)
print(paste("ICC:", round(vpc_null$ICC_adjusted, 3)))
## [1] "ICC: 0.24"

All individual predictors + universal regional predictors

# Baseline random intercept model
model_for_pooling <- glmer(
  UB8 ~ 
    # Level 1 predictors (child/household)
    CAGE + # Age in months
    ED5A + # mother's/caregiver's education
    EC1 + #Three or more books
    two_plus_playthings +
    supervised_inadequately +
    psy_aggression +
    early_stimulation +
    dev_on_track +
    HH6 + # Rural/urban
    HH48 + # household size
    HL13 + # Natural mother lives in the household
    HL17 + # Natural father lives in the household
    windex5 +
    HC10E + # Family has a car
    
    # Level 2 predictors (structure)
    popul_mln_total_01012025 +
    popul_density_log +
    total_pre_end_2024_log +

    # Random intercept for region
    (1 | region),
  
  data = tkm_df,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  control = glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 100000))
)

# Model summary
summary(model_for_pooling, correlation =TRUE)
## Generalized linear mixed model fit by maximum likelihood (Laplace
##   Approximation) [glmerMod]
##  Family: binomial  ( logit )
## Formula: 
## UB8 ~ CAGE + ED5A + EC1 + two_plus_playthings + supervised_inadequately +  
##     psy_aggression + early_stimulation + dev_on_track + HH6 +  
##     HH48 + HL13 + HL17 + windex5 + HC10E + popul_mln_total_01012025 +  
##     popul_density_log + total_pre_end_2024_log + (1 | region)
##    Data: tkm_df
## Control: glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 1e+05))
## 
##       AIC       BIC    logLik -2*log(L)  df.resid 
##    1287.7    1385.4    -624.8    1249.7      1245 
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -4.1011 -0.5645  0.2581  0.5550  3.8166 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  region (Intercept) 0.002518 0.05018 
## Number of obs: 1264, groups:  region, 7
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                           Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)              -2.301909   1.235758  -1.863 0.062497 .  
## CAGE                      0.007539   0.010472   0.720 0.471540    
## ED5A                      0.451622   0.132134   3.418 0.000631 ***
## EC1                       0.676525   0.170420   3.970 7.19e-05 ***
## two_plus_playthings      -0.333201   0.210264  -1.585 0.113040    
## supervised_inadequately  -0.359537   0.462833  -0.777 0.437266    
## psy_aggression           -0.120158   0.153633  -0.782 0.434150    
## early_stimulation         0.052971   0.357108   0.148 0.882081    
## dev_on_track              0.441429   0.208776   2.114 0.034484 *  
## HH6                      -1.148498   0.234508  -4.897 9.71e-07 ***
## HH48                     -0.094814   0.038775  -2.445 0.014475 *  
## HL13                      0.243244   0.466817   0.521 0.602319

## popul_density_log         0.035204   0.049770   0.707 0.479358    
## total_pre_end_2024_log    0.431496   0.136092   3.171 0.001521 ** 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) CAGE   ED5A   EC1    tw_pl_ sprvs_ psy_gg erly_s dv_n_t
## CAGE        -0.413                                                        
## ED5A        -0.064 -0.009                                                 
## EC1          0.183 -0.075 -0.006                                          
## tw_pls_plyt -0.201  0.028  0.030 -0.073                                   
## sprvsd_ndqt  0.005  0.027 -0.027  0.027 -0.036                            
## psy_aggrssn -0.003 -0.056  0.017  0.044 -0.089 -0.064                     
## erly_stmltn -0.344 -0.020 -0.004 -0.179  0.029 -0.032 -0.059              
## dev_on_trck -0.143  0.080  0.020 -0.101 -0.059 -0.029 -0.001 -0.054       
## HH6         -0.423  0.011 -0.112 -0.183 -0.022 -0.059  0.098  0.009  0.016
## HH48        -0.263  0.057  0.096 -0.005 -0.057  0.057 -0.016  0.064  0.015
## HL13        -0.347  0.021  0.018 -0.007 -0.048  0.023  0.052 -0.003  0.009
## HL17        -0.150 -0.029 -0.061  0.001  0.067  0.060 -0.005 -0.003 -0.003
## windex5     -0.390  0.062 -0.173 -0.121  0.021 -0.051  0.062 -0.002  0.027
## HC10E       -0.073  0.047 -0.120 -0.122 -0.022  0.030 -0.004  0.004 -0.009
## p___0101202  0.236  0.026  0.001 -0.004  0.079 -0.044  0.112 -0.039  0.014
## ppl_dnsty_l -0.199 -0.059  0.027  0.012  0.065  0.015 -0.106  0.126 -0.020
## ttl___2024_ -0.483 -0.044 -0.008 -0.095  0.074 -0.006 -0.147  0.133 -0.044
##             HH6    HH48   HL13   HL17   windx5 HC10E  p___01 ppl_d_
## CAGE                                                               
## ED5A                                                               
## EC1                                                                
## tw_pls_plyt                                                        
## sprvsd_ndqt                                                        
## psy_aggrssn                                                        
## erly_stmltn                                                        
## dev_on_trck                                                        
## HH6                                                                
## HH48         0.019                                                 
## HL13        -0.007  0.053                                          
## HL17        -0.074  0.106 -0.209                                   
## windex5      0.662  0.086  0.033 -0.043                            
## HC10E       -0.069 -0.118  0.032  0.114 -0.099                     
## p___0101202 -0.197  0.024 -0.033 -0.049  0.117 -0.020              
## ppl_dnsty_l -0.029 -0.014 -0.013  0.003 -0.415 -0.088 -0.258       
## ttl___2024_  0.133 -0.075 -0.017 -0.002 -0.027  0.030 -0.683  0.404
## optimizer (bobyqa) convergence code: 0 (OK)
## Model failed to converge with max|grad| = 0.00355295 (tol = 0.002, component 1)
##   See ?lme4::convergence and ?lme4::troubleshooting.
or_model <- model_for_pooling
ame_model <- avg_slopes(model_for_pooling, type = "response")

modelsummary(
  list(
    "Odds Ratios" = or_model,
    "Marginal Effects" = ame_model
  ),
  exponentiate = c(TRUE, FALSE),
  statistic = "conf.int",
  stars = TRUE,
  output = "gt"
)

anova(model_null, model_for_pooling)
## Data: tkm_df
## Models:
## model_null: UB8 ~ 1 + (1 | region_mics)
## model_for_pooling: UB8 ~ CAGE + ED5A + EC1 + two_plus_playthings + supervised_inadequately + psy_aggression + early_stimulation + dev_on_track + HH6 + HH48 + HL13 + HL17 + windex5 + HC10E + popul_mln_total_01012025 + popul_density_log + total_pre_end_2024_log + (1 | region)
##                   npar    AIC    BIC  logLik -2*log(L)  Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)    
## model_null           2 1501.7 1512.0 -748.85    1497.7                         
## model_for_pooling   19 1287.7 1385.4 -624.83    1249.7 248.04 17  < 2.2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
check_collinearity(model_for_pooling)
## # Check for Multicollinearity
## 
## Low Correlation
## 
##                      Term  VIF   VIF 95% CI adj. VIF Tolerance Tolerance 95% CI
##                      CAGE 1.03 [1.01, 1.19]     1.02      0.97     [0.84, 0.99]
##                      ED5A 1.08 [1.04, 1.18]     1.04      0.92     [0.85, 0.96]
##                       EC1 1.14 [1.09, 1.23]     1.07      0.87     [0.81, 0.92]
##       two_plus_playthings 1.07 [1.03, 1.17]     1.04      0.93     [0.85, 0.97]
##   supervised_inadequately 1.02 [1.00, 1.25]     1.01      0.98     [0.80, 1.00]
##            psy_aggression 1.07 [1.03, 1.17]     1.03      0.93     [0.85, 0.97]
##         early_stimulation 1.08 [1.03, 1.17]     1.04      0.93     [0.85, 0.97]
##              dev_on_track 1.03 [1.00, 1.20]     1.02      0.97     [0.83, 1.00]
##                       HH6 2.60 [2.39, 2.85]     1.61      0.38     [0.35, 0.42]
##                      HH48 1.09 [1.04, 1.18]     1.04      0.92     [0.85, 0.96]
##                      HL13 1.08 [1.04, 1.18]     1.04      0.92     [0.85, 0.96]
##                      HL17 1.12 [1.07, 1.21]     1.06      0.89     [0.83, 0.93]
##                   windex5 3.21 [2.94, 3.53]     1.79      0.31     [0.28, 0.34]
##                     HC10E 1.12 [1.07, 1.21]     1.06      0.89     [0.82, 0.93]
##  popul_mln_total_01012025 2.44 [2.25, 2.67]     1.56      0.41     [0.37, 0.45]
##         popul_density_log 1.86 [1.72, 2.02]     1.36      0.54     [0.50, 0.58]
##    total_pre_end_2024_log 2.54 [2.34, 2.78]     1.60      0.39     [0.36, 0.43]
r2(model_for_pooling)
## # R2 for Mixed Models
## 
##   Conditional R2: 0.429
##      Marginal R2: 0.429
r2(model_null)
## # R2 for Mixed Models
## 
##   Conditional R2: 0.240
##      Marginal R2: 0.000
# Robustness check
model_fe_region <- glm(
  UB8 ~ CAGE + # Age in months
    ED5A + # mother's/caregiver's education
    EC1 + #Three or more books
    two_plus_playthings +
    supervised_inadequately +
    psy_aggression +
    early_stimulation +
    dev_on_track +
    HH6 + # Rural/urban
    HH48 + # household size
    HL13 + # Natural mother lives in the household
    HL17 + # Natural father lives in the household
    windex5 +
    HC10E + # Family has a car
    
    # Level 2 predictors (structure)
    popul_mln_total_01012025 +
    popul_density_log +
    total_pre_end_2024_log +
    factor(region),
  data = tkm_df,
  family = binomial
)

modelsummary(
  list(
    "Multilevel model" = model_for_pooling,
    "Region Fixed Effects Model" = model_fe_region
  ),
  exponentiate = TRUE
)

SD (Intercept region) 0.050
Num.Obs. 1264 1264
R2 Marg. 0.429
R2 Cond. 0.429
AIC 1287.7 1282.0
BIC 1385.4 1390.0
ICC 0.0
Log.Lik. -619.999
RMSE 0.40 0.40

All available country-specific variables, fixed slopes

model_full <- glmer(
    UB8 ~ 
    # Level 1 predictors (child/household)
    CAGE + # Age in months
    ED5A + # mother's/caregiver's education
    EC1 + #Three or more books
    two_plus_playthings +
    supervised_inadequately +
    psy_aggression +
    early_stimulation +
    dev_on_track +
    received_econ_assist + # Social transfers!
    HH6 + # Rural/urban
    HH48 + # household size
    HL13 + # Natural mother lives in the household
    HL17 + # Natural father lives in the household
    windex5 +
    HC10E + # Family has a car
    
    # Level 2 predictors (structure)
    popul_mln_total_01012025 +
    popul_density_log +
    total_pre_end_2024_log +
    
    # Random intercept for region
    (1 | region),
  
  data = tkm_df,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  control = glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 100000))
)

summary(model_full, correlation = TRUE)
## Generalized linear mixed model fit by maximum likelihood (Laplace
##   Approximation) [glmerMod]
##  Family: binomial  ( logit )
## Formula: 
## UB8 ~ CAGE + ED5A + EC1 + two_plus_playthings + supervised_inadequately +  
##     psy_aggression + early_stimulation + dev_on_track + received_econ_assist +  
##     HH6 + HH48 + HL13 + HL17 + windex5 + HC10E + popul_mln_total_01012025 +  
##     popul_density_log + total_pre_end_2024_log + (1 | region)
##    Data: tkm_df
## Control: glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 1e+05))
## 
##       AIC       BIC    logLik -2*log(L)  df.resid 
##    1289.3    1392.2    -624.7    1249.3      1244 
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -3.9959 -0.5617  0.2582  0.5555  3.8086 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  region (Intercept) 0.003551 0.05959 
## Number of obs: 1264, groups:  region, 7
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                           Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)              -2.326852   1.241078  -1.875 0.060811 .  
## CAGE                      0.007654   0.010482   0.730 0.465246    
## ED5A                      0.448478   0.132159   3.393 0.000690 ***
## EC1                       0.673732   0.170501   3.951 7.77e-05 ***
## two_plus_playthings      -0.332988   0.210853  -1.579 0.114281    
## supervised_inadequately  -0.357704   0.462635  -0.773 0.439410    
## psy_aggression           -0.115819   0.153759  -0.753 0.451299    
## early_stimulation         0.049973   0.357599   0.140 0.888861    
## dev_on_track              0.439672   0.208936   2.104 0.035349 *  
## received_econ_assist      0.089026   0.156796   0.568 0.570182    
## HH6                      -1.148373   0.234103  -4.905 9.32e-07 ***
## HH48                     -0.101869   0.040752  -2.500 0.012429 *  
## HL13                      0.246327   0.468004   0.526 0.598655    
## HL17                      0.102375   0.286599   0.357 0.720936    
## windex5                   0.379988   0.095564   3.976 7.00e-05 ***
## HC10E                     0.394005   0.180598   2.182 0.029134 *  
## popul_mln_total_01012025 -0.788174   0.228859  -3.444 0.000573 ***
## popul_density_log         0.035593   0.050321   0.707 0.479372    
## total_pre_end_2024_log    0.433531   0.137556   3.152 0.001623 ** 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) CAGE   ED5A   EC1    tw_pl_ sprvs_ psy_gg erly_s dv_n_t
## CAGE        -0.412                                                        
## ED5A        -0.063 -0.009                                                 
## EC1          0.181 -0.075 -0.006                                          
## tw_pls_plyt -0.200  0.027  0.030 -0.069                                   
## sprvsd_ndqt  0.005  0.027 -0.029  0.025 -0.038                            
## psy_aggrssn -0.003 -0.056  0.017  0.044 -0.089 -0.062                     
## erly_stmltn -0.342 -0.021 -0.003 -0.176  0.030 -0.032 -0.061              
## dev_on_trck -0.143  0.080  0.020 -0.102 -0.060 -0.028 -0.002 -0.053       
## rcvd_cn_sss -0.037  0.019 -0.041 -0.029  0.001  0.006  0.050 -0.014 -0.014
## HH6         -0.419  0.010 -0.109 -0.180 -0.025 -0.057  0.094  0.007  0.017
## HH48        -0.238  0.048  0.105  0.006 -0.053  0.052 -0.031  0.065  0.019
## HL13        -0.348  0.022  0.017 -0.007 -0.047  0.023  0.053 -0.001  0.010
## HL17        -0.150 -0.028 -0.062  0.001  0.068  0.060 -0.007 -0.002 -0.002
## windex5     -0.387  0.062 -0.172 -0.121  0.018 -0.048  0.060 -0.003  0.028
## HC10E       -0.073  0.048 -0.119 -0.119 -0.021  0.030 -0.005  0.003 -0.010
## p___0101202  0.236  0.025  0.002 -0.004  0.077 -0.043  0.110 -0.040  0.014
## ppl_dnsty_l -0.204 -0.057  0.024  0.012  0.065  0.013 -0.104  0.125 -0.021
## ttl___2024_ -0.487 -0.043 -0.009 -0.094  0.074 -0.007 -0.144  0.132 -0.044
##             rcvd__ HH6    HH48   HL13   HL17   windx5 HC10E  p___01 ppl_d_
## CAGE                                                                      
## ED5A                                                                      
## EC1                                                                       
## tw_pls_plyt                                                               
## sprvsd_ndqt                                                               
## psy_aggrssn                                                               
## erly_stmltn                                                               
## dev_on_trck                                                               
## rcvd_cn_sss                                                               
## HH6         -0.001                                                        
## HH48        -0.305  0.016                                                 
## HL13         0.012 -0.007  0.048                                          
## HL17        -0.030 -0.073  0.110 -0.210                                   
## windex5      0.012  0.661  0.076  0.035 -0.042                            
## HC10E        0.029 -0.072 -0.121  0.032  0.115 -0.101                     
## p___0101202 -0.013 -0.195  0.027 -0.032 -0.049  0.117 -0.020              
## ppl_dnsty_l  0.014 -0.029 -0.017 -0.013  0.003 -0.412 -0.086 -0.254       
## ttl___2024_  0.027  0.131 -0.079 -0.016 -0.002 -0.027  0.031 -0.684  0.405
## optimizer (bobyqa) convergence code: 0 (OK)
## Model failed to converge with max|grad| = 0.00261423 (tol = 0.002, component 1)
##   See ?lme4::convergence and ?lme4::troubleshooting.
or_model_full <- model_full
ame_model_full <- avg_slopes(model_full, type = "response")
modelsummary(
  list("Odds Ratios" = or_model_full, "Marginal Effects" = ame_model_full),
  exponentiate = c(TRUE, FALSE),
  statistic = "conf.int",
  stars = TRUE,
  output = "gt"
)

anova(model_for_pooling, model_full)
## Data: tkm_df
## Models:
## model_for_pooling: UB8 ~ CAGE + ED5A + EC1 + two_plus_playthings + supervised_inadequately + psy_aggression + early_stimulation + dev_on_track + HH6 + HH48 + HL13 + HL17 + windex5 + HC10E + popul_mln_total_01012025 + popul_density_log + total_pre_end_2024_log + (1 | region)
## model_full: UB8 ~ CAGE + ED5A + EC1 + two_plus_playthings + supervised_inadequately + psy_aggression + early_stimulation + dev_on_track + received_econ_assist + HH6 + HH48 + HL13 + HL17 + windex5 + HC10E + popul_mln_total_01012025 + popul_density_log + total_pre_end_2024_log + (1 | region)
##                   npar    AIC    BIC  logLik -2*log(L)  Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)
## model_for_pooling   19 1287.7 1385.4 -624.83    1249.7                     
## model_full          20 1289.3 1392.2 -624.67    1249.3 0.3228  1     0.5699
check_collinearity(model_full)
## # Check for Multicollinearity
## 
## Low Correlation
## 
##                      Term  VIF   VIF 95% CI adj. VIF Tolerance Tolerance 95% CI
##                      CAGE 1.03 [1.01, 1.19]     1.02      0.97     [0.84, 0.99]
##                      ED5A 1.09 [1.04, 1.18]     1.04      0.92     [0.85, 0.96]
##                       EC1 1.14 [1.09, 1.23]     1.07      0.88     [0.81, 0.92]
##       two_plus_playthings 1.07 [1.03, 1.17]     1.03      0.93     [0.86, 0.97]
##   supervised_inadequately 1.02 [1.00, 1.26]     1.01      0.98     [0.80, 1.00]
##            psy_aggression 1.07 [1.03, 1.17]     1.04      0.93     [0.85, 0.97]
##         early_stimulation 1.07 [1.03, 1.17]     1.04      0.93     [0.85, 0.97]
##              dev_on_track 1.03 [1.01, 1.20]     1.02      0.97     [0.84, 0.99]
##      received_econ_assist 1.11 [1.06, 1.20]     1.06      0.90     [0.83, 0.94]
##                       HH6 2.57 [2.36, 2.82]     1.60      0.39     [0.36, 0.42]
##                      HH48 1.20 [1.14, 1.29]     1.10      0.83     [0.77, 0.88]
##                      HL13 1.08 [1.04, 1.18]     1.04      0.92     [0.85, 0.96]
##                      HL17 1.12 [1.07, 1.21]     1.06      0.89     [0.82, 0.93]
##                   windex5 3.18 [2.91, 3.49]     1.78      0.31     [0.29, 0.34]
##                     HC10E 1.12 [1.07, 1.21]     1.06      0.89     [0.82, 0.93]
##  popul_mln_total_01012025 2.44 [2.24, 2.66]     1.56      0.41     [0.38, 0.45]
##         popul_density_log 1.85 [1.71, 2.01]     1.36      0.54     [0.50, 0.58]
##    total_pre_end_2024_log 2.55 [2.34, 2.79]     1.60      0.39     [0.36, 0.43]
r2(model_full)
## # R2 for Mixed Models
## 
##   Conditional R2: 0.430
##      Marginal R2: 0.429

Reduced models

Only significant fixed effects (p < .05) from model_full

model_sign <- glmer(
    UB8 ~ 
    # Level 1 predictors (child/household)
    ED5A + # mother's/caregiver's education
    EC1 + #Three or more books
    dev_on_track +
    HH6 +
    HH48 +
    windex5 +
    HC10E + # Family has a car
    
    # Level 2 predictors (structure)
    popul_mln_total_01012025 +
    total_pre_end_2024_log +

    # Random intercept for region
    (1 | region),  
  data = tkm_df,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  control = glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 100000))
)

summary(model_sign, correlation = TRUE)
## Generalized linear mixed model fit by maximum likelihood (Laplace
##   Approximation) [glmerMod]
##  Family: binomial  ( logit )
## Formula: UB8 ~ ED5A + EC1 + dev_on_track + HH6 + HH48 + windex5 + HC10E +  
##     popul_mln_total_01012025 + total_pre_end_2024_log + (1 |      region)
##    Data: tkm_df
## Control: glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 1e+05))
## 
##       AIC       BIC    logLik -2*log(L)  df.resid 
##    1277.7    1334.3    -627.9    1255.7      1253 
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -4.2246 -0.5540  0.2624  0.5511  3.5594 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  region (Intercept) 0.01013  0.1006  
## Number of obs: 1264, groups:  region, 7
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                          Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)              -1.75100    0.83858  -2.088 0.036793 *  
## ED5A                      0.45865    0.13080   3.507 0.000454 ***
## EC1                       0.66998    0.16221   4.130 3.62e-05 ***
## dev_on_track              0.40546    0.20799   1.949 0.051242 .  
## HH6                      -1.12783    0.22576  -4.996 5.86e-07 ***
## HH48                     -0.10302    0.03821  -2.696 0.007013 ** 
## windex5                   0.41452    0.08224   5.041 4.64e-07 ***
## HC10E                     0.38352    0.17647   2.173 0.029758 *  
## popul_mln_total_01012025 -0.70019    0.23547  -2.974 0.002944 ** 
## total_pre_end_2024_log    0.39808    0.13156   3.026 0.002480 ** 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) ED5A   EC1    dv_n_t HH6    HH48   windx5 HC10E  p___01
## ED5A        -0.123                                                        
## EC1          0.057 -0.029                                                 
## dev_on_trck -0.199  0.022 -0.107                                          
## HH6         -0.601 -0.101 -0.141  0.007                                   
## HH48        -0.276  0.112  0.020  0.015  0.027                            
## windex5     -0.658 -0.153 -0.017  0.018  0.669  0.087                     
## HC10E       -0.014 -0.101 -0.088 -0.023 -0.097 -0.149 -0.210              
## p___0101202  0.296  0.010  0.041  0.019 -0.242  0.030  0.006 -0.047       
## ttl___2024_ -0.645 -0.012 -0.083 -0.034  0.153 -0.073  0.150  0.066 -0.676
or_model_sign <- model_sign
ame_model_sign <- avg_slopes(model_sign, type = "response")
modelsummary(
  list("Odds Ratios" = or_model_sign, "Marginal Effects" = ame_model_sign),
  exponentiate = c(TRUE, FALSE),
  statistic = "conf.int",
  stars = TRUE,
  output = "gt"
)

## Data: tkm_df
## Models:
## model_sign: UB8 ~ ED5A + EC1 + dev_on_track + HH6 + HH48 + windex5 + HC10E + popul_mln_total_01012025 + total_pre_end_2024_log + (1 | region)
## model_full: UB8 ~ CAGE + ED5A + EC1 + two_plus_playthings + supervised_inadequately + psy_aggression + early_stimulation + dev_on_track + received_econ_assist + HH6 + HH48 + HL13 + HL17 + windex5 + HC10E + popul_mln_total_01012025 + popul_density_log + total_pre_end_2024_log + (1 | region)
##            npar    AIC    BIC  logLik -2*log(L)  Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)
## model_sign   11 1277.8 1334.3 -627.87    1255.8                     
## model_full   20 1289.3 1392.2 -624.67    1249.3 6.4024  9     0.6991
check_collinearity(model_sign)
## # Check for Multicollinearity
## 
## Low Correlation
## 
##                      Term  VIF   VIF 95% CI adj. VIF Tolerance Tolerance 95% CI
##                      ED5A 1.06 [1.02, 1.17]     1.03      0.94     [0.86, 0.98]
##                       EC1 1.07 [1.03, 1.17]     1.03      0.94     [0.86, 0.97]
##              dev_on_track 1.02 [1.00, 1.53]     1.01      0.98     [0.65, 1.00]
##                       HH6 2.24 [2.06, 2.44]     1.50      0.45     [0.41, 0.49]
##                      HH48 1.05 [1.01, 1.17]     1.02      0.95     [0.86, 0.99]
##                   windex5 2.30 [2.12, 2.51]     1.52      0.43     [0.40, 0.47]
##                     HC10E 1.10 [1.06, 1.20]     1.05      0.91     [0.84, 0.95]
##  popul_mln_total_01012025 2.25 [2.07, 2.45]     1.50      0.44     [0.41, 0.48]
##    total_pre_end_2024_log 2.10 [1.94, 2.29]     1.45      0.48     [0.44, 0.52]
r2(model_sign)
## # R2 for Mixed Models
## 
##   Conditional R2: 0.419
##      Marginal R2: 0.417

Extra model: interactions + random slopes

model_extra <- glmer(
  UB8 ~ 
    # Level 1 predictors (child/household)
    ED5A + # mother's/caregiver's education
    EC1 + #Three or more books
    dev_on_track +
    HH6 +
    HH48 +
    windex5 +
    HC10E + # Family has a car
    
    # Level 2 predictors (structure)
    popul_mln_total_01012025 +
    total_pre_end_2024_log +
    
    # Random slopes
    (1 + windex5 | region_mics),
  
  data = tkm_df,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  control = glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 100000))
)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
summary(model_extra, correlation = TRUE)
## Generalized linear mixed model fit by maximum likelihood (Laplace
##   Approximation) [glmerMod]
##  Family: binomial  ( logit )
## Formula: UB8 ~ ED5A + EC1 + dev_on_track + HH6 + HH48 + windex5 + HC10E +  
##     popul_mln_total_01012025 + total_pre_end_2024_log + (1 +  
##     windex5 | region_mics)
##    Data: tkm_df
## Control: glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 1e+05))
## 
##       AIC       BIC    logLik -2*log(L)  df.resid 
##    1281.6    1348.4    -627.8    1255.6      1251 
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -4.2695 -0.5564  0.2590  0.5442  3.5027 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name        Variance Std.Dev. Corr 
##  region_mics (Intercept) 0.004079 0.06387       
##              windex5     0.003492 0.05910  -1.00
## Number of obs: 1264, groups:  region_mics, 7
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                          Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)              -1.60669    0.90008  -1.785 0.074254 .  
## ED5A                      0.45719    0.12942   3.533 0.000411 ***
## EC1                       0.67122    0.14904   4.504 6.68e-06 ***
## dev_on_track              0.40012    0.20814   1.922 0.054565 .  
## HH6                      -1.14536    0.20856  -5.492 3.98e-08 ***
## HH48                     -0.10043    0.03823  -2.627 0.008610 ** 
## windex5                   0.39572    0.08382   4.721 2.35e-06 ***
## HC10E                     0.38986    0.17442   2.235 0.025407 *  
## popul_mln_total_01012025 -0.62731    0.23581  -2.660 0.007810 ** 
## total_pre_end_2024_log    0.36671    0.14835   2.472 0.013437 *  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) ED5A   EC1    dv_n_t HH6    HH48   windx5 HC10E  p___01
## ED5A        -0.137                                                        
## EC1          0.007 -0.099                                                 
## dev_on_trck -0.176  0.021 -0.122                                          
## HH6         -0.534 -0.047  0.010  0.012                                   
## HH48        -0.249  0.119  0.038  0.014  0.012                            
## windex5     -0.619 -0.115  0.087  0.016  0.610  0.072                     
## HC10E        0.013 -0.076 -0.034 -0.023 -0.177 -0.158 -0.249              
## p___0101202  0.267 -0.011 -0.001  0.021 -0.227  0.020  0.014 -0.032       
## ttl___2024_ -0.717 -0.010 -0.091 -0.043  0.135 -0.062  0.188  0.059 -0.598
## optimizer (bobyqa) convergence code: 0 (OK)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
or_model_extra <- model_extra
ame_model_extra <- avg_slopes(model_extra, type = "response")
modelsummary(
  list("Odds Ratios" = or_model_extra, "Marginal Effects" = ame_model_extra),
  exponentiate = c(TRUE, FALSE),
  statistic = "conf.int",
  stars = TRUE,
  output = "gt"
)
Odds Ratios Marginal Effects

+ p < 0.1, * p < 0.05, ** p < 0.01, *** p < 0.001 
anova(model_sign, model_extra)
## Data: tkm_df
## Models:
## model_sign: UB8 ~ ED5A + EC1 + dev_on_track + HH6 + HH48 + windex5 + HC10E + popul_mln_total_01012025 + total_pre_end_2024_log + (1 | region)
## model_extra: UB8 ~ ED5A + EC1 + dev_on_track + HH6 + HH48 + windex5 + HC10E + popul_mln_total_01012025 + total_pre_end_2024_log + (1 + windex5 | region_mics)
##             npar    AIC    BIC  logLik -2*log(L) Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)
## model_sign    11 1277.8 1334.3 -627.87    1255.8                    
## model_extra   13 1281.6 1348.4 -627.78    1255.6 0.183  2     0.9126
check_collinearity(model_extra)
## # Check for Multicollinearity
## 
## Low Correlation
## 
##                      Term  VIF   VIF 95% CI adj. VIF Tolerance Tolerance 95% CI
##                      ED5A 1.05 [1.02, 1.17]     1.02      0.95     [0.86, 0.98]
##                       EC1 1.06 [1.02, 1.17]     1.03      0.94     [0.86, 0.98]
##              dev_on_track 1.02 [1.00, 1.33]     1.01      0.98     [0.75, 1.00]
##                       HH6 1.85 [1.71, 2.01]     1.36      0.54     [0.50, 0.58]
##                      HH48 1.05 [1.02, 1.17]     1.02      0.95     [0.86, 0.98]
##                   windex5 2.00 [1.85, 2.18]     1.41      0.50     [0.46, 0.54]
##                     HC10E 1.11 [1.06, 1.20]     1.06      0.90     [0.83, 0.94]
##  popul_mln_total_01012025 1.86 [1.73, 2.03]     1.37      0.54     [0.49, 0.58]
##    total_pre_end_2024_log 1.81 [1.68, 1.97]     1.35      0.55     [0.51, 0.59]
r2(model_extra)
## Random effect variances not available. Returned R2 does not account for random effects.
## # R2 for Mixed Models
## 
##   Conditional R2: NA
##      Marginal R2: 0.408

Model comparison table

modelsummary(
  list(
    "Null"         = model_null,
    "For Pooling"  = model_for_pooling,
    "Full"         = model_full,
    "Significant"  = model_sign,
    "Extra"        = model_extra
  ),
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  statistic = "conf.int",
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "logLik", "AIC", "BIC", "icc", "r2.marginal", "r2.conditional"),
  output = "gt"
)

+ p < 0.1, * p < 0.05, ** p < 0.01, *** p < 0.001 
# Plots
# Coefficient plot (OR forest plot) for model_sign

coef_df <- tidy(model_sign, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
  mutate(
    sig = case_when(
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "p < .001",
      p.value < 0.01  ~ "p < .01",
      p.value < 0.05  ~ "p < .05",
      TRUE            ~ "n.s."
    ),
    sig = factor(sig, levels = c("p < .001", "p < .01", "p < .05", "n.s."))
  )

p_coef <- ggplot(coef_df, aes(x = estimate, y = reorder(term, estimate), color = sig)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high), height = 0.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("p < .001" = "#d73027", "p < .01" = "#f46d43",
               "p < .05" = "#fdae61", "n.s." = "grey60")
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Odds Ratios — Significant Model",
    x        = "Odds Ratio (95% CI)",
    y        = NULL,
    color    = "Significance"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_coef)
## `height` was translated to `width`.

# Marginal effects plot (AME) 
ame_df <- as.data.frame(ame_model_sign) %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
  mutate(
    sig = case_when(
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "p < .001",
      p.value < 0.01  ~ "p < .01",
      p.value < 0.05  ~ "p < .05",
      TRUE            ~ "n.s."
    ),
    sig = factor(sig, levels = c("p < .001", "p < .01", "p < .05", "n.s."))
  )

p_ame <- ggplot(ame_df, aes(x = estimate, y = reorder(term, estimate), color = sig)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high), height = 0.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("p < .001" = "#d73027", "p < .01" = "#f46d43",
               "p < .05" = "#fdae61", "n.s." = "grey60")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Marginal Effects — Significant Model",
    x     = "AME on Pr(UB8=1)",
    y     = NULL,
    color = "Significance"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_ame)
## `height` was translated to `width`.

#  Predicted probabilities for key predictors
pred_ed5a <- ggpredict(model_sign, terms = "ED5A [all]", bias_correction = TRUE)
p_ed5a <- plot(pred_ed5a) +
  labs(title = "Predicted Probability by Mother's Education (ED5A)",
       x = "Education Level", y = "Pr(UB8 = 1)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12)+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))

pred_windex <- ggpredict(model_sign, terms = "windex5 [all]", bias_correction = TRUE)
p_windex <- plot(pred_windex) +
  labs(title = "Predicted Probability by Wealth Index",
       x = "Wealth Index (windex5)", y = "Pr(UB8 = 1)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12)

print(p_ed5a)

print(p_windex)

#  4. Random effects (regional variation) 
re_df <- ranef(model_sign, condVar = TRUE)$region %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("region") %>%
  rename(intercept = `(Intercept)`) %>%
  mutate(
    se = sqrt(attr(ranef(model_sign, condVar = TRUE)$region, "postVar")[1, 1, ]),
    lower = intercept - 1.96 * se,
    upper = intercept + 1.96 * se
  )

p_re <- ggplot(re_df, aes(x = intercept, y = reorder(region, intercept))) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper), height = 0.3, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Regional Random Intercepts (±1.96 SE)",
    x     = "Random Intercept (log-odds scale)",
    y     = "Region"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12)

print(p_re)
## `height` was translated to `width`.

#  5. Random slopes by region (model_extra: windex5 | region_mics) 
re_slopes_df <- ranef(model_extra, condVar = TRUE)$region_mics %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("region") %>%
  rename(intercept = `(Intercept)`, slope_windex = windex5)

p_slopes <- ggplot(re_slopes_df, aes(x = intercept, y = slope_windex, label = region)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "steelblue") +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Random Intercepts vs. Random Slopes for Wealth Index by Region",
    x     = "Random Intercept",
    y     = "Random Slope (windex5)"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12)

print(p_slopes)

#  ICC and R² across models — summary bar chart 
model_list <- list(
  "Null"        = model_null,
  "For Pooling" = model_for_pooling,
  "Full"        = model_full,
  "Significant" = model_sign,
  "Extra"       = model_extra
)

r2_df <- purrr::map_dfr(names(model_list), function(nm) {
  r2_vals <- r2(model_list[[nm]])
  icc_result <- tryCatch(
    performance::icc(model_list[[nm]])$ICC_adjusted,
    error = function(e) NA_real_
  )
  
  tibble::tibble(
    model        = nm,
    R2_marginal  = r2_vals$R2_marginal,
    R2_conditional = r2_vals$R2_conditional,
    ICC          = icc_result
  )
}) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(-model, names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(model = factor(model, levels = names(model_list)))
## Random effect variances not available. Returned R2 does not account for random effects.
p_r2 <- ggplot(r2_df, aes(x = model, y = value, fill = metric)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("R2_marginal" = "#4575b4", "R2_conditional" = "#74add1", "ICC" = "#f46d43"),
    labels = c("ICC", "R² Conditional", "R² Marginal")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Model Fit Comparison: R² and ICC",
    x     = NULL,
    y     = "Value",
    fill  = NULL
  ) +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_r2)

Model predictive performance comparison

# Splitting data

tkm_df <- tkm_df %>%
  mutate(strata_var = paste0(region_mics, "_", UB8))

train_idx <- createDataPartition(tkm_df$strata_var, p = 0.75, list = FALSE)
train_df  <- tkm_df[train_idx, ]
test_df   <- tkm_df[-train_idx, ]


# Refit all models on training data
# Swapping tkm_df to train_df in each model call
# Example:
model_null_train <- update(model_null, data = train_df)
model_pool_train <- update(model_for_pooling, data = train_df)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
model_full_train <- update(model_full, data = train_df)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
model_sign_train <- update(model_sign, data = train_df)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
model_extra_train <- update(model_extra, data = train_df)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
# Predict test set
# allow.new.levels = TRUE handles regions in test not seen in train
predict_prob <- function(model, newdata) {
  predict(model, newdata = newdata, type = "response", allow.new.levels = TRUE)
}

probs <- list(
  Null = predict_prob(model_null_train, test_df),
  For_Pooling = predict_prob(model_pool_train, test_df),
  Full = predict_prob(model_full_train, test_df),
  Significant = predict_prob(model_sign_train, test_df),
  Extra = predict_prob(model_extra_train, test_df)
)


# Metrics

metrics_df <- purrr::map2_dfr(
  probs, names(probs),
  ~ compute_metrics(.x, as.numeric(as.character(test_df$UB8)), .y)
)

Performance comparison table

metrics_df %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 3))) %>%
  gt::gt() %>%
  gt::tab_header(title = "Out-of-Sample Prediction Accuracy Comparison") %>%
  gt::fmt_number(columns = where(is.numeric), decimals = 3) %>%
  gt::cols_label(
    Model       = "Model",
    AUC         = "AUC",
    Accuracy    = "Accuracy",
    Sensitivity = "Sensitivity",
    Specificity = "Specificity",
    PPV         = "Precision (PPV)",
    F1          = "F1 Score",
    Brier       = "Brier Score",
    LogLoss     = "Log Loss"
  ) %>%
  gt::tab_style(
    style = gt::cell_fill(color = "#d4edda"),
    locations = gt::cells_body(
      rows = Accuracy == max(Accuracy)
    )
  )
Out-of-Sample Prediction Accuracy Comparison
Model AUC Accuracy Sensitivity Specificity Precision (PPV) F1 Score Brier Score Log Loss
Null 0.763 0.714 0.756 0.667 0.717 0.736 0.195 0.575
For_Pooling 0.829 0.778 0.823 0.728 0.771 0.796 0.165 0.506
Full 0.829 0.781 0.823 0.735 0.776 0.799 0.165 0.506
Significant 0.832 0.768 0.805 0.728 0.767 0.786 0.164 0.504
Extra 0.832 0.768 0.805 0.728 0.767 0.786 0.164 0.504
 
# ROC curves plot (all models)
roc_list <- purrr::map2(probs, names(probs), function(p, nm) {
  roc_obj <- roc(as.numeric(as.character(test_df$UB8)), p, quiet = TRUE)
  data.frame(
    model       = paste0(nm, " (AUC=", round(auc(roc_obj), 3), ")"),
    sensitivity = roc_obj$sensitivities,
    specificity = roc_obj$specificities
  )
})

roc_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(roc_list)

p_roc <- ggplot(roc_df, aes(x = 1 - specificity, y = sensitivity, color = model)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(
    title = "ROC Curves — Out-of-Sample Performance",
    x     = "1 - Specificity (FPR)",
    y     = "Sensitivity (TPR)",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_roc)

# Calibration plot — predicted vs. observed probabilities
cal_df <- purrr::map2_dfr(probs, names(probs), function(p, nm) {
  data.frame(
    model    = nm,
    pred     = p,
    observed = as.numeric(as.character(test_df$UB8))
  )
})

# Bin predictions into deciles per model
cal_binned <- cal_df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(model) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(bin = ntile(pred, 10)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(model, bin) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_pred = mean(pred),
    mean_obs  = mean(observed),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

p_cal <- ggplot(cal_binned, aes(x = mean_pred, y = mean_obs, color = model)) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(
    title = "Calibration Plot — Predicted vs. Observed Probabilities",
    x     = "Mean Predicted Probability",
    y     = "Mean Observed Proportion",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_cal)
